texts.source: 液体式ディーゼル機関車DD51が牽引する、50系(オハ50、オハフ50)客車普通列車です。
texts.translation: This is a local passenger train pulled by a DD51 liquid-cooled diesel locomotive, consisting of 50 Series passenger coaches (Oha 50, OhaFu 50).

texts.source: 液体式ディーゼル機関車DD51が牽引する、冷房化された50系1000番台(オハ50、オハフ50)と12系(スハフ12)の客車普通列車です。
texts.translation: This is a local passenger train pulled by a DD51 liquid-cooled diesel locomotive, consisting of air-conditioned 50 Series 1000 subseries (Oha 50, OhaFu 50) and 12 Series (SuHaFu 12) passenger coaches.
